user.title: Inverter Type
user.description: Select the inverter type for battery control.

sensors.title: Sensor Mapping
sensors.description: Map the sensors for SOC, capacity, and PV power.

data_description.battery_soc_sensor: Sensor showing the current charge level of the home battery in %.
data_description.battery_capacity_sensor: Sensor for the total battery capacity in Wh. For Huawei: enable the 'Storage Rated Capacity' sensor under Settings → Devices → Entities (disabled by default).
data_description.battery_capacity_kwh: Alternatively: enter the total battery capacity in kWh manually (e.g. 10 for LUNA2000-10, 15 for LUNA2000-15).
data_description.pv_power_sensor: Sensor showing the current solar panel output power in kW.

forecast.title: Forecast Source
forecast.description: Select the PV forecast source. The chosen integration must be installed and loaded.

data_description.forecast_source: Solcast Solar (HACS) or Forecast.Solar (HA Core) as source for PV production forecasts.
data_description.forecast_remaining_entity: Sensor showing the remaining PV production for today in kWh.
data_description.forecast_tomorrow_entity: Sensor showing the forecasted PV production for tomorrow in kWh.

consumption.title: Consumption Measurement
consumption.description: Configure the calculation parameters for consumption profiles.

data_description.lookback_weeks: Number of weeks for the rolling consumption average (default: 8 weeks).
data_description.update_interval_fast_min: Update interval for PV forecast and battery sensors in minutes (default: 1 min).
data_description.update_interval_slow_min: Update interval for the consumption profile in minutes (default: 15 min).

error.prerequisite_not_installed: The {integration_name} integration must be installed and loaded.
error.forecast_not_installed: The selected forecast integration is not installed or not loaded. Please install it first.
error.capacity_required: Please either select a capacity sensor or enter the capacity manually.

abort.already_configured: EEG Energy Optimizer is already configured.
